caption: The video begins with a static image featuring the logo of Kanal13AZ, which is prominently displayed in the center against a light gray background. The logo consists of a red circle with the number "13" and the word "kanal" written inside it. Below the logo, the text "Kanal13AZ" is clearly visible. A red rectangular button with the words "abunə ol" (which translates to "subscribe" in Azerbaijani) and a YouTube play icon is positioned beneath the text. As the video progresses, the entire screen gradually darkens, transitioning from a light gray to a darker shade, while the logo, text, and subscribe button remain in place but become less prominent due to the dimming effect. This transition suggests the end of the video or a shift to another segment.
